phase: Phase 1.1 acceptance gate (sessionSignaledState persistence) — full minimum-coverage matrix run
constitutional_anchor: clause 6.G clause 5 + clause 6.I clauses 2 + 4 + 6 + Sixth Law clause 5 + Seventh Law clause 3

clause_3_screen_size_coverage.phone_class: PASS — all 4 AVDs are phone form factor
clause_3_screen_size_coverage.tablet_class: OWED — no tablet AVD in this run; clause 6.I clause 3 minimum requires phone + tablet for any feature whose layout could differ. Phase 1.1 (persistence layer) does NOT touch layout, so phone-only is appropriate; full release-tag matrix will need tablet coverage.
clause_3_screen_size_coverage.tv_class: N/A — Challenge00 does not touch TvActivity or leanback manifest entries.

clause_6_I_coverage_status.clause_4_per_avd_attestation_row: PASS — 4 rows recorded, each naming AVD, API level, form factor, test class, pass/fail, seconds.

clause_5_falsifiability_rehearsal_per_ve.API_28_class_rehearsal: OWED — same protocol as the JVM AuthServiceImplPersistenceTest mutation rehearsal would apply. Owed at next phase that touches the persistence write path.
clause_5_falsifiability_rehearsal_per_ve.API_34_class_rehearsal: Done at the JVM layer (commit 3672cbf, AuthServiceImplPersistenceTest mutation rehearsal recorded in commit body). Device-level rehearsal owed in next phase.

clause_6_I_coverage_status.clause_6_cold_boot_only: Honestly partial — `--cold-boot` flag is passed to cmd/emulator-matrix, but if the AVD's cache is hot from earlier same-session runs, the actual boot is still much faster than a true first-launch cold boot. The boot_seconds field reads near-zero because matrix.go captures BootResult.BootDuration (time from launch command to launch return), not WaitForBoot duration. Reporting bug recorded for follow-up.
clause_6_I_coverage_status.clause_7_tag_sh_enforcement: OWED — scripts/tag.sh has not yet been updated to consume this evidence file pattern. Owed in the next phase that touches release tagging.
clause_6_I_coverage_status.clause_8_inheritance: PASS — submodule constitutions all carry clause 6.M (which references 6.I) per the propagation in commit 20539d5.

what_the_matrix_proved_end_to_end: Phase 1.1 sessionSignaledState persistence works on Android 9, 11, 14, and 16 — covering 6 years of Android API surface (2018 → 2024 stable releases plus the 2026 latest-stable bump).
PreferencesStorageImpl.signaled_auth.xml lifecycle (write on signalAuthorized, clear on logout) is byte-equivalent across all four API levels.

AuthServiceImpl.signalAuthorized's call into preferencesStorage.saveSignaledAuthState fires consistently across ART versions, despite the historical NoSuchMethodException risk on API 36 (Pixel_9a) that previously blocked C1 deep navigation. Challenge00 does NOT touch deep navigation, so the API-36 path is clean here.
The 2026-05-04 evening WaitForBoot fix (Submodules/Containers commit 2f3c689) is regression-protected by this run — without the fix, the matrix would have failed at the boot stage on every AVD.
deep_coverage_still_owed: Container-bound matrix run per clause 6.I clause 1 (next phase that touches the matrix gate).
Tablet form factor per clause 6.I clause 3 (release-tag prerequisite).
Per-API-class falsifiability rehearsal recorded with on-device repro (clause 6.I clause 5).
True am-force-stop survival via UiAutomator-driven shell access (Phase 1.1.7 owed).
Cold-boot-only enforcement audit per clause 6.I clause 6 (the boot_seconds field needs to capture WaitForBoot duration, not launch-command duration; matrix.go reporting bug).
next_pending_remediation_priorities: matrix.go BootResult.BootDuration → WaitForBoot duration capture (cosmetic but relevant to clause 6.I clause 6 audit)
scripts/tag.sh consumption of .lava-ci-evidence/<tag>/real-device-verification.* glob pattern (per clause 6.I clause 7)
Container-bound matrix run via Submodules/Containers/cmd/distributed-test (clause 6.I clause 1 + clause 6.K mandate)
